## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint test` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] README/CONTRIBUTING updated if config or commands changed
- [ ] Helm chart values + helpers updated if applicable
- [ ] Breaking changes flagged in PR title (e.g. `feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` in body)
